causalAutopsy.notes: The SessionManager idle-monitor never had the settle discipline the SessionWatchdog uses — it emitted rateLimitedAtIdle on a single-glance detectRateLimited, so a stale/transient throttle line false-fired a recovery. Pre-existing since the idle-monitor was written; the milder cousin of the #1262 finished-session spam (CMT-1785 F3).
